title: Xentara Config File
description: The root of the Xentara config file

httpServer.title: HTTP Server Configuration
httpServer.description: The configuration for the built-in Xentara HTTP server

port.title: Port Number
port.description: The TCP port number of the HTTP server

authentication.title: Authentication
authentication.description: The authentication options for the HTTP server

realm.title: Realm
realm.description: The HTTP protection space (realm) for the WWW-Authenticate header

schemes.title: Authentication Schemes
schemes.description: The authentication schemes supported by the HTTP server

items.title: Authentication Scheme
items.description: An authentication schemes supported by the HTTP server

items.title: OAuth 2.0 Scope String
items.description: A scope string to include in the OAuth 2.0 scope

^skill\\..+.title: Skill Configuration
^skill\\..+.description: The configuration section for a specific Xentara skill
